text: OWASP Top 10 - A01:2021 Broken Access Control: Failures in access control allowing unauthorized access to data or functions.
OWASP Top 10 - A02:2021 Cryptographic Failures: Weak or compromised cryptographic algorithms leading to data exposure.
OWASP Top 10 - A03:2021 Injection: SQL, NoSQL, OS, and LDAP injection vulnerabilities.
OWASP Top 10 - A04:2021 Insecure Design: Design-level flaws that cannot be fixed by implementation alone.
OWASP Top 10 - A05:2021 Security Misconfiguration: Improperly configured security settings across the application stack.
OWASP Top 10 - A06:2021 Vulnerable and Outdated Components: Using components with known vulnerabilities.
OWASP Top 10 - A07:2021 Identification and Authentication Failures: Weak or broken authentication mechanisms.
OWASP Top 10 - A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures: Software updates or data streams modified without detection.
OWASP Top 10 - A09:2021 Security Logging and Monitoring Failups: Insufficient logging for security incident detection.
OWASP Top 10 - A10:2021 Server-Side Request Forgery: SSRF attacks allowing access to internal resources.
